questions.question:
A runtime diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe CRI guidance.

A ConfigMap named `runtime-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `runtime-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetNode` is `kind-cluster-control-plane`
- `kubeletConfigCheck` is `sudo grep -n containerRuntimeEndpoint /var/lib/kubelet/config.yaml`
- `runtimeSocketCheck` is `sudo test -S /run/containerd/containerd.sock`
- `crictlInfoCheck` is `sudo crictl --runtime-endpoint unix:///run/containerd/containerd.sock info`
- `crictlPodsCheck` is `sudo crictl --runtime-endpoint unix:///run/containerd/containerd.sock pods`
- `runtimeServiceCheck` is `sudo systemctl status containerd`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/runtime-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/runtime-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Kubelet Wiring`, `CRI Connectivity`, and `Runtime Service`

Do not edit `/var/lib/kubelet/config.yaml`, do not restart kubelet, and do not stop or restart containerd during this drill.

verification.description: The runtime diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended node target, kubelet runtime-endpoint check, CRI socket inspection, crictl commands, and safe runtime service guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact kubelet wiring, CRI connectivity, and runtime service commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe runtime remediation guidance is removed
